title: [circt-bmc] Add simple initial value support to ExternalizeRegisters
body: Adds support for initial values (as long as they're defined directly by a `hw.constant` op inside a `seq.initial`) to `ExternalizeRegisters` - I'll add the support for this in circt-bmc as a follow-up to slim down the diff. Initial values are added in an ArrayAttr on the module op - if there's no initial value then it just adds a unit attr
